stories: Good morning, Sean — it's Sunday the twelfth of April, 2026
Here's one for you: sixty-five years ago this morning, Yuri Gagarin became the first human being to reach outer space
He launched at 9:07am Moscow time, completed one orbit of Earth in 108 minutes, and came home
What most people don't know is that he didn't land inside the capsule — he ejected and parachuted down separately, because the Soviets weren't confident the landing system could be trusted
He didn't know whether the hatch would even open
He found out the same way he found out everything else that day — by going anyway
Over in Singapore, Parliament has moved the Securities and Futures Amendment Bill to first reading
This sets up the regulatory framework for the Global Listing Board — SGX's joint venture with Nasdaq
Good morning Sean, it's Saturday, the 11th of April, 2026
Here's a fun one to kick off the weekend: identical twins don't actually share the same fingerprints
Despite having identical DNA, tiny differences in blood flow, womb positioning, and amniotic fluid movement during development mean every fingerprint is completely unique — even between twins
Nature doing bespoke work at the microscopic level
Your calendar today is light — as Saturdays go
One commitment to note: you've got your bi-monthly catch-up with Ajit at one o'clock this afternoon on Teams, running through to a quarter to two
On Singapore, the headline this morning is the fuel security deal between Prime Minister Lawrence Wong and Australian PM Anthony Albanese, who has been in the city-state this week
The two signed a joint statement today confirming Singapore's continued supply of refined fuel — petrol and diesel — to Australia, with Wong explicitly ruling out any export restrictions
Good morning Sean, it's Friday, the 10th of April, 2026
on this day in 1633, curious Londoners pressed their noses against a shop window to stare at something most of them had never seen before — a bunch of bananas, freshly arrived from Bermuda
Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese landed overnight and is sitting down with PM Lawrence Wong today to finalise a fuel security agreement
the fragile ceasefire between the United States and Iran is under serious strain this morning
Iran's parliamentary speaker has publicly accused Washington of breaching the terms of the two-week ceasefire agreement
The IMF's Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva has weighed in, warning that the conflict has already triggered a measurable global economic slowdown
Meta has debuted its first major new AI model since its significant leadership reshuffle
Researchers have built a working prototype of a quantum battery
